name: REPAIRITEMTOTALS_123_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE REPAIRITEMTOTALS_123_01
AS
SELECT LOGICALREF INTO KAPAT_123_01 FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WITH(INDEX = I123_01_ORFLINE_I2) WHERE (CLOSED=1 AND  STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))) OR (CLOSED=1 AND LINETYPE IN (4,11))
SELECT LOGICALREF,DORDRETURNDATE INTO CLOSEDDIST_123_01 FROM LG_123_01_DISTORDLINE
WHERE DORDRETURNDATE IS NOT NULL AND DORDSTATUS=2 AND  ITEMREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
ALTER TABLE LG_123_01_DISTORDLINE DISABLE TRIGGER ALL
UPDATE LG_123_01_DISTORDLINE SET REMAMOUNT = SHIPAMOUNT WHERE  ITEMREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
ALTER TABLE LG_123_01_DISTORDLINE ENABLE TRIGGER ALL
ALTER TABLE LG_123_01_ORFLINE DISABLE TRIGGER ALL
UPDATE LG_123_01_ORFLINE SET SHIPPEDAMOUNT = 0, ONVEHICLE = 0, DISTRESERVED = 0, CLOSED=0 WHERE (LINETYPE NOT IN (4) AND ( STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))))) OR (LINETYPE IN (11))
ALTER TABLE LG_123_01_ORFLINE ENABLE TRIGGER ALL
UPDATE LG_123_PURCHOFFERLN SET ORDEREDAMOUNT = 0 WHERE (LINETYPE NOT IN (4) AND ( STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))))) OR (LINETYPE IN (11))
IF 1 = '1'
 BEGIN UPDATE LG_123_01_ORFLINE SET SHIPPEDAMOUNT = 0, ONVEHICLE = 0, DISTRESERVED = 0, CLOSED=0 WHERE (LINETYPE IN (4))
       UPDATE LG_123_01_SRVNUMS SET ORDERED = 0, SHIPPED = 0, LASTTRDATE = 0
       UPDATE LG_123_PURCHOFFERLN SET ORDEREDAMOUNT = 0 WHERE (LINETYPE IN (4))
 END
ALTER TABLE LG_123_01_DISTORDLINE DISABLE TRIGGER ALL
UPDATE LG_123_01_DISTORDLINE SET DORDSTATUS=1,DORDRETURNDATE=NULL
WHERE DORDRETURNDATE IS NOT NULL AND DORDSTATUS=2 AND  ITEMREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
ALTER TABLE LG_123_01_DISTORDLINE ENABLE TRIGGER ALL
DELETE FROM LG_123_01_STINVTOT WHERE  STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
DELETE FROM LG_123_01_ITMWSTOT WHERE  ITEMREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
DELETE FROM LG_123_01_VRNTINVTOT WHERE  STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
IF 1 = '1'
 TRUNCATE TABLE LG_123_01_SRVTOT
DECLARE @c_lService SMALLINT, @c_SubContract SMALLINT, @c_PStatPlanned SMALLINT, @c_PStatRealized SMALLINT,
        @c_TrWarehouse SMALLINT, @c_TrWorkStation SMALLINT, @c_RepairOn SMALLINT, @c_RepairOff SMALLINT,
        @_ItemRef INT, @_VariantRef INT, @_TransDate DATETIME, @_TrCode SMALLINT, @_CancFlag SMALLINT,
        @_LineType SMALLINT, @_BilledFlag SMALLINT, @_DecPrDiff SMALLINT, @_LProdStat SMALLINT,
        @_SourceType SMALLINT, @_SourceIndex SMALLINT, @_DestType SMALLINT, @_DestIndex SMALLINT,
        @_SourceWSRef INT, @_DestWSRef INT, @_Amount FLOAT, @_Price FLOAT, @_PrPrice FLOAT,
        @_Unit1CFact FLOAT, @_Unit2CFact FLOAT, @_VatPer FLOAT, @_LineNet FLOAT, @_DistCost FLOAT,
        @_DistAddExp FLOAT, @_DiffPrice FLOAT, @_DiffRepPrice FLOAT, @_ReportRate FLOAT,
        @_TrRate FLOAT, @_VatIncFlag SMALLINT, @_InvoiceRef INT, @_OrdTransRef INT,
        @_StFicheRef INT, @_IOCode SMALLINT, @_RlsAmount FLOAT, @_OrdClsPlnAmnt FLOAT, @_DISTORDLINEREF INT, @dummy INT,
        @_Status SMALLINT, @_DoReserve SMALLINT, @Month SMALLINT , @Year SMALLINT, @_UOMRef INT, @_OffTrRef INT, @_OffRef INT
SELECT  @c_lService = 4, @c_SubContract = 11, @c_PStatPlanned = 1, @c_PStatRealized = 0,
        @c_RepairOn = 1, @c_RepairOff = 0, @c_TrWarehouse = 0, @c_TrWorkStation = 1
 IF 1 = '1'
  BEGIN
        DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
        SELECT  I.STOCKREF, I.DATE_,I.TRCODE, I.CANCELLED, I.LINETYPE, I.BILLED, I.DECPRDIFF,
                I.LPRODSTAT, I.SOURCETYPE, I.SOURCEINDEX, I.DESTTYPE, I.DESTINDEX, I.SOURCEWSREF,
                I.DESTWSREF, I.AMOUNT, I.PRICE, I.UINFO1, I.UINFO2, I.VAT, I.LINENET,
                I.DISTCOST, I.DISTADDEXP, I.DIFFPRICE, I.DIFFREPPRICE, I.REPORTRATE,
                I.VATINC, I.INVOICEREF, I.ORDTRANSREF, I.STFICHEREF, I.IOCODE,
                I.PLNAMOUNT, I.PORDCLSPLNAMNT, I.DISTORDLINEREF, I.STATUS, I.DORESERVE,
                I.MONTH_, I.YEAR_, I.UOMREF, I.VARIANTREF, I.OFFTRANSREF, I.OFFERREF
        FROM LG_123_01_STLINE I WITH(INDEX = I123_01_STLINE_I2) WHERE ( STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))))
           OR ((I.LINETYPE = @c_lService) OR (I.LINETYPE = @c_SubContract))
  END
 ELSE BEGIN DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
            SELECT  I.STOCKREF, I.DATE_,I.TRCODE, I.CANCELLED, I.LINETYPE, I.BILLED, I.DECPRDIFF,
                    I.LPRODSTAT, I.SOURCETYPE, I.SOURCEINDEX, I.DESTTYPE, I.DESTINDEX, I.SOURCEWSREF,
                    I.DESTWSREF, I.AMOUNT, I.PRICE, I.UINFO1, I.UINFO2, I.VAT, I.LINENET,
                    I.DISTCOST, I.DISTADDEXP, I.DIFFPRICE, I.DIFFREPPRICE, I.REPORTRATE,
                    I.VATINC, I.INVOICEREF, I.ORDTRANSREF, I.STFICHEREF, I.IOCODE,
                    I.PLNAMOUNT, I.PORDCLSPLNAMNT, I.DISTORDLINEREF, I.STATUS, I.DORESERVE,
                    I.MONTH_, I.YEAR_, I.UOMREF, I.VARIANTREF, I.OFFTRANSREF, I.OFFERREF
            FROM LG_123_01_STLINE I WITH(INDEX = I123_01_STLINE_I2) WHERE ( STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))))
           AND ((I.LINETYPE <> @c_lService) AND (I.LINETYPE <> @c_SubContract))
      END
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO  @_ItemRef,@_TransDate,@_TrCode,@_CancFlag,@_LineType,@_BilledFlag,@_DecPrDiff,@_LProdStat,@_SourceType,
      @_SourceIndex,@_DestType,@_DestIndex,@_SourceWSRef,@_DestWSRef,@_Amount,@_Price,@_Unit1CFact,
      @_Unit2CFact,@_VatPer,@_LineNet,@_DistCost,@_DistAddExp,@_DiffPrice,@_DiffRepPrice,@_ReportRate,
      @_VatIncFlag,@_InvoiceRef,@_OrdTransRef,@_StFicheRef,@_IOCode,@_RlsAmount,@_OrdClsPlnAmnt,@_DISTORDLINEREF,
      @_Status, @_DoReserve,
      @Month, @Year, @_UOMRef, @_VariantRef, @_OffTrRef, @_OffRef
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
   IF ((@_LineType <> @c_lService) OR (@_LineType <> @c_SubContract))
    EXECUTE LG_STKHANDLENUMBERS_123_01  @_ItemRef,@_VariantRef,@_transDate,@_trCode,1,@_canCFlAg,@_lineType,
                                        @_billedFlag,@_DecPrDiff,@_lProdStat,@_sourceType,@_destType,
                                        @_sourceWSRef,@_destWSRef,@_sourceIndex,@_destIndex,@_amount,
                                        @_price,@_unit1CFact,@_unit2CFact,@_vatPer,@_distCost,@_distAddExp,
                                        @_diffPrice,@_diffRepPrice,@_reportRate,@_VatIncFlag,@_InvoiceRef,
                                        @_ordTransRef,@_DISTORDLINEREF,@_stFicheRef,@_IOCode,@_RlsAmount,@_OrdClsPlnAmnt,
                                        @_Status, @_DoReserve,
                                        @Month, @Year, @_UOMRef, @_OffTrRef, @_OffRef
   IF ((@_LineType = @c_lService) OR (@_LineType = @c_SubContract))
    EXECUTE LG_UPDATESRVFORTRANS_123_01 @_ItemRef,@_TransDate, @_TrCode,@_CancFlag,@_SourceIndex,
                                        @_VatIncFlag,@_OrdTransRef,@_Unit1CFact,@_Unit2CFact,@_VatPer,
                                        @_DistCost,@_DistAddExp,@_Price,@_ReportRate,@_Amount,1, @_Status,
                                        @Month, @Year, @_OffTrRef, @_OffRef, @_billedFlag
   FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
   INTO @_ItemRef,@_TransDate,@_TrCode,@_CancFlag,@_LineType,@_BilledFlag,@_DecPrDiff,@_LProdStat,
        @_SourceType, @_SourceIndex,@_DestType,@_DestIndex,@_SourceWSRef,@_DestWSRef,@_Amount,
        @_Price,@_Unit1CFact,@_Unit2CFact,@_VatPer,@_LineNet,@_DistCost,@_DistAddExp,@_DiffPrice,
        @_DiffRepPrice,@_ReportRate,@_VatIncFlag,@_InvoiceRef,@_OrdTransRef,@_StFicheRef,@_IOCode,
        @_RlsAmount,@_OrdClsPlnAmnt,@_DISTORDLINEREF,
        @_Status, @_DoReserve,
        @Month, @Year, @_UOMRef, @_VariantRef, @_OffTrRef, @_OffRef
 END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE @oLn_LINETYPE       SMALLINT
DECLARE @oLn_STOCKREF       INT
DECLARE @oLn_VARIANTREF     INT
DECLARE @oLn_AMOUNT         FLOAT
DECLARE @oLn_SHIPPEDAMOUNT  FLOAT
DECLARE @oLn_UINFO1         FLOAT
DECLARE @oLn_UINFO2         FLOAT
DECLARE @oLn_DT             DATETIME
DECLARE @oLn_DORESERVE      SMALLINT
DECLARE @oLn_RESERVEDT      DATETIME
DECLARE @oLn_CLOSED         SMALLINT
DECLARE @oLn_CANCELLED      SMALLINT
DECLARE @oLn_STATUS         SMALLINT
DECLARE @oLn_TRCODE         SMALLINT
DECLARE @oLn_SOURCEINDEX    SMALLINT
DECLARE @oLn_OFFTRANSREF    INT
DECLARE @oLn_OFFERREF       INT
DECLARE @oLn_PREVLINEREF    INT
DECLARE @oLn_DETLINE        SMALLINT
DECLARE @oLn_PREVLINENO     SMALLINT
IF 1 = '1'
  BEGIN DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
        SELECT I.LINETYPE, I.STOCKREF, I.AMOUNT, I.SHIPPEDAMOUNT, I.UINFO1, I.UINFO2,
               I.DATE_, I.DORESERVE, I.RESERVEDATE, I.CLOSED, I.STATUS, I.TRCODE, I.SOURCEINDEX, I.CANCELLED,
               I.OFFTRANSREF, I.OFFERREF, I.PREVLINEREF, I.DETLINE, I.PREVLINENO, I.VARIANTREF
        FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE I WITH(INDEX = I123_01_ORFLINE_I2) WHERE ( STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0))))
        OR ((I.LINETYPE = 4) OR (I.LINETYPE = 11))
  END
 ELSE BEGIN DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
            SELECT I.LINETYPE, I.STOCKREF, I.AMOUNT, I.SHIPPEDAMOUNT, I.UINFO1, I.UINFO2,
                   I.DATE_, I.DORESERVE, I.RESERVEDATE, I.CLOSED, I.STATUS, I.TRCODE, I.SOURCEINDEX, I.CANCELLED,
                   I.OFFTRANSREF, I.OFFERREF, I.PREVLINEREF, I.DETLINE, I.PREVLINENO, I.VARIANTREF
            FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE I WITH(INDEX = I123_01_ORFLINE_I2) WHERE ( STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))) AND
        (I.LINETYPE <> 4) AND (I.LINETYPE <> 11)
      END
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO @oLn_LINETYPE, @oLn_STOCKREF, @oLn_AMOUNT, @oLn_SHIPPEDAMOUNT, @oLn_UINFO1,
     @oLn_UINFO2, @oLn_DT, @oLn_DORESERVE, @oLn_RESERVEDT, @oLn_CLOSED, @oLn_STATUS, @oLn_TRCODE,
     @oLn_SOURCEINDEX, @oLn_CANCELLED,
     @oLn_OFFTRANSREF, @oLn_OFFERREF, @oLn_PREVLINEREF, @oLn_DETLINE, @oLn_PREVLINENO, @oLn_VARIANTREF
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
   IF (@oLn_CANCELLED=1)
   BEGIN
   EXECUTE LG_UPDATE_ORDTRANS_123_01 @oLn_LINETYPE, @oLn_STOCKREF, @oLn_VARIANTREF, @oLn_AMOUNT,
                                     @oLn_SHIPPEDAMOUNT, @oLn_UINFO1, @oLn_UINFO2,
                                     @oLn_DT, @oLn_DORESERVE, @oLn_RESERVEDT, 0,
                                     @oLn_STATUS, @oLn_TRCODE, @oLn_SOURCEINDEX,
                                     @oLn_OFFTRANSREF, @oLn_OFFERREF, @oLn_PREVLINEREF, @oLn_DETLINE, @oLn_PREVLINENO, -1, 0
   END
   EXECUTE LG_UPDATE_ORDTRANS_123_01 @oLn_LINETYPE, @oLn_STOCKREF, @oLn_VARIANTREF, @oLn_AMOUNT,
                                     @oLn_SHIPPEDAMOUNT, @oLn_UINFO1, @oLn_UINFO2,
                                     @oLn_DT, @oLn_DORESERVE, @oLn_RESERVEDT, @oLn_CLOSED,
                                     @oLn_STATUS, @oLn_TRCODE, @oLn_SOURCEINDEX,
                                     @oLn_OFFTRANSREF, @oLn_OFFERREF, @oLn_PREVLINEREF, @oLn_DETLINE, @oLn_PREVLINENO, 1, 0
   FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
   INTO @oLn_LINETYPE, @oLn_STOCKREF, @oLn_AMOUNT, @oLn_SHIPPEDAMOUNT, @oLn_UINFO1,
        @oLn_UINFO2, @oLn_DT, @oLn_DORESERVE, @oLn_RESERVEDT, @oLn_CLOSED, @oLn_STATUS, @oLn_TRCODE,
        @oLn_SOURCEINDEX, @oLn_CANCELLED,@oLn_OFFTRANSREF, @oLn_OFFERREF, @oLn_PREVLINEREF, @oLn_DETLINE, @oLn_PREVLINENO, @oLn_VARIANTREF
 END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE @oLn_LOGICALREF     INT
DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
 SELECT I.LOGICALREF FROM KAPAT_123_01 I
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO @oLn_LOGICALREF
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
 BEGIN TRAN UPD
  UPDATE LG_123_01_ORFLINE SET CLOSED=1 WHERE LOGICALREF=@oLn_LOGICALREF
 COMMIT TRAN UPD
   FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
   INTO @oLn_LOGICALREF
 END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE @c_CompLine         SMALLINT
DECLARE @dLn_ITEMREF        INT
DECLARE @dLn_VARIANTREF     INT
DECLARE @dLn_ORDLINEREF     INT
DECLARE @dLn_DORDDATE       DATETIME
DECLARE @dLn_SHIPAMOUNT     FLOAT
DECLARE @dLn_REMAMOUNT      FLOAT
DECLARE @dLn_UOMREF         INT
DECLARE @dLn_SOURCEINDEX    SMALLINT
DECLARE @dLn_DORDSTATUS     INT
DECLARE @dLn_DORDGODATE     DATETIME
DECLARE @dLn_DORDRETDATE    DATETIME
DECLARE @dLn_LINETYPE       SMALLINT
DECLARE @dLn_PAR_UINFO1     FLOAT
DECLARE @dLn_PAR_UINFO2     FLOAT
SELECT @c_CompLine  = 7
DECLARE CurS CURSOR FOR
 SELECT I.ITEMREF, I.ORDLINEREF, I.DATE_, I.SHIPAMOUNT, I.REMAMOUNT, I.UOMREF,
        I.SOURCEINDEX, I.DORDSTATUS, I.DORDGODATE, I.DORDRETURNDATE, I.LINETYPE,
        I.UINFO1, I.UINFO2, I.VARIANTREF
 FROM LG_123_01_DISTORDLINE I
 WHERE  (I.LINETYPE<>@c_CompLine) AND  ITEMREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK, INDEX = I123_ITEMS_I2)  WHERE CODE LIKE 'MBAP0099H017' AND (ACTIVE IN (0)))
OPEN CurS
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
INTO @dLn_ITEMREF, @dLn_ORDLINEREF, @dLn_DORDDATE, @dLn_SHIPAMOUNT, @dLn_REMAMOUNT,
     @dLn_UOMREF, @dLn_SOURCEINDEX, @dLn_DORDSTATUS, @dLn_DORDGODATE, @dLn_DORDRETDATE,
     @dLn_LINETYPE, @dLn_PAR_UINFO1, @dLn_PAR_UINFO2, @dLn_VARIANTREF
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
IF @dLn_DORDSTATUS=2
 BEGIN
   EXECUTE LG_DTHANDLENUMBERS_123_01 1, @dLn_ITEMREF,  @dLn_VARIANTREF, @dLn_ORDLINEREF, @dLn_DORDDATE,
                                     @dLn_SHIPAMOUNT,  @dLn_REMAMOUNT,  @dLn_UOMREF,
                                     @dLn_SOURCEINDEX, 1, @dLn_DORDGODATE,
                                     @dLn_DORDRETDATE, @dLn_PAR_UINFO1, @dLn_PAR_UINFO2
   EXECUTE LG_DTHANDLENUMBERS_123_01 -1, @dLn_ITEMREF, @dLn_VARIANTREF, @dLn_ORDLINEREF, @dLn_DORDDATE,
                                     @dLn_SHIPAMOUNT,  0,  @dLn_UOMREF,
                                     @dLn_SOURCEINDEX, @dLn_DORDSTATUS, @dLn_DORDGODATE,
                                     @dLn_DORDRETDATE, @dLn_PAR_UINFO1, @dLn_PAR_UINFO2
 END
IF @dLn_DORDSTATUS<>2
 BEGIN
   EXECUTE LG_DTHANDLENUMBERS_123_01 1, @dLn_ITEMREF,  @dLn_VARIANTREF, @dLn_ORDLINEREF, @dLn_DORDDATE,
                                     @dLn_SHIPAMOUNT,  @dLn_REMAMOUNT,  @dLn_UOMREF,
                                     @dLn_SOURCEINDEX, @dLn_DORDSTATUS, @dLn_DORDGODATE,
                                     @dLn_DORDRETDATE, @dLn_PAR_UINFO1, @dLn_PAR_UINFO2
 END
   FETCH NEXT FROM CurS
   INTO @dLn_ITEMREF, @dLn_ORDLINEREF, @dLn_DORDDATE, @dLn_SHIPAMOUNT, @dLn_REMAMOUNT,
        @dLn_UOMREF, @dLn_SOURCEINDEX, @dLn_DORDSTATUS, @dLn_DORDGODATE, @dLn_DORDRETDATE,
        @dLn_LINETYPE, @dLn_PAR_UINFO1, @dLn_PAR_UINFO2, @dLn_VARIANTREF
 END
CLOSE CurS
DEALLOCATE CurS
DECLARE @dLn_LOGICALREF     INT
DECLARE @dLn_DATE  DATETIME
DECLARE CurS1 CURSOR FOR
 SELECT I.LOGICALREF,I.DORDRETURNDATE FROM CLOSEDDIST_123_01  I
OPEN CurS1
FETCH NEXT FROM CurS1
INTO @dLn_LOGICALREF,@dLn_DATE
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
 BEGIN TRAN UPD
  UPDATE LG_123_01_DISTORDLINE SET DORDSTATUS=2,DORDRETURNDATE=@dLn_DATE WHERE LOGICALREF=@dLn_LOGICALREF
 COMMIT TRAN UPD
   FETCH NEXT FROM CurS1
   INTO @dLn_LOGICALREF,@dLn_DATE
 END
CLOSE CurS1
DEALLOCATE CurS1
